testcase.name: test_renew_license_default_days
testcase.failure: tests/test_license_management.py:154: in test_renew_license_default_days assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to renew license: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to renew license: {"detail":"An internal server error occurred.
